reason: Defines well-known capability keys, ToolCluster mappings, tool path policy, and catalog expectations that must change when Canvas tools converge into workspace_module.
Defines workspace_module as a Replace projection dimension and VFS as Accumulate; needed to preserve Canvas visibility and session mount semantics during convergence.
Defines embedded skill bundle authoring, builtin SkillAsset bootstrap, lifecycle projection, and validation rules for adding workspace-module-system guidance.
Defines WorkspacePanel, canvas-panel, and extension-runtime composition boundaries for frontend Canvas presentation changes.
Defines cross-layer tab renderer and runtime event contracts affected by workspace_module_presented Canvas payload changes.
